perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a middle-aged man wearing a grey flat cap and glasses (3C Tim) speaking directly to the camera in what appears to be a mobile phone retail store. (2) Graphics and the 'Tabelog' logo appear around him as he gestures. (3) A sequence follows showing screen recordings of a mobile application (Tabelog) displaying restaurant listings, Japanese maps, and ratings in Traditional Chinese. (4) Tim reappears, holding a smartphone and pointing at the screen to emphasize features. (5) The video ends with Tim giving a thumbs-up gesture and pointing towards the viewer while promotional text remains on screen.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo electronic pop music begins immediately. A male voice (3C Tim) speaks in Mandarin with a loud, enthusiastic, and high-energy tone. (2) The music continues as a consistent background layer while the narration explains the benefits of the Tabelog app. (3) There are subtle sound effects (soft pops or dings) synchronized with text appearing on the screen. (4) The audio remains clear and professional with no significant ambient noise from the environment.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '去日本自由行' (Solo travel to Japan) - Catchy hook to grab attention. (2) '必下載的APP' (Must-download APP) - Functional instruction. (3) 'Tabelog 食ベログ' - Brand identity. (4) '日本最大美食平台' (Japan's largest food platform) - Value proposition. (5) '推出繁體中文APP' (Launched Traditional Chinese APP) - Key feature update. (6) '89萬家餐廳', '8500萬真實評論' (890,000 restaurants, 85 million real reviews) - Supporting data. (7) 'miko 米可手機館' - Store branding visible in the corner throughout.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Hook -> Feature Demonstration (App Interface) -> Value Proposition -> Call to Action

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main creator (3C Tim) appearing as the host.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: An Asian male wearing a grey patterned flat cap, black-rimmed glasses, a white t-shirt, and a grey knitted cardigan.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The primary background is a brightly lit electronics store with display stands for smartphones (specifically vivo and realme) and accessories. Other segments feature digital app interface mockups.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Introduction of App -> Feature Breakdown -> Statistical Proof -> Call to Action
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a promotional tutorial designed to inform travelers to Japan about the new Traditional Chinese version of the Tabelog app. It aims to demonstrate the app's superiority over Google Maps for finding authentic Japanese cuisine by highlighting its massive database and user-generated review system, while simultaneously promoting the 'miko' mobile shop where the host is located.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The host specifically recommends the app and the video is branded with 'miko 米可手機館' logos.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: 3C Tim's signature hat and tech-reviewer persona.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video uses typical 'infotainment' editing styles common in the 3C (Computer, Communication, Consumer Electronics) influencer niche in Taiwan.
